subcodes.title: Letter to Mulla Muhammad Ja'far Kirmani
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath caused the letter Kaf to speak forth from His Essence, through His Essence, unto His Essence, ere His Book had been decreed by the permission of God. Thereafter, He hath established it in the station of Command with that which His Essence had accepted [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی استنطق حرف الکاف من نفسه بنفسه الی نفسه قبل ما اقضت کتابه باذن الله ثم جعله فی مقام الامر بما قبلت نفسه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
